evals.prompt: 帮我分析一下 /data/services/app/logs/app.log 最近的报错。
evals.expected_output: 读取日志文件，按 traceId/线程拆分链路，识别 ERROR 级别日志，产出聚焦模式报告（直接回答报错原因）。
assertions: Reads the log file from the specified path
Identifies log format and extracts key fields (timestamp, thread, level, traceId)
Uses focused mode since user has a specific question (errors)
Provides grep commands for further investigation

evals.prompt:
这段日志帮我看看为什么接口超时了：
2026-03-09 21:15:01.234 [http-nio-8080-exec-5] - [INFO] [UserController] traceId:abc123 - GET /api/users started
2026-03-09 21:15:01.235 [http-nio-8080-exec-5] - [DEBUG] [UserService] traceId:abc123 - Querying users with filter
2026-03-09 21:15:06.789 [http-nio-8080-exec-5] - [WARN] [UserService] traceId:abc123 - Query took 5554ms
2026-03-09 21:15:06.790 [http-nio-8080-exec-5] - [ERROR] [UserController] traceId:abc123 - Request timeout after 5555ms
evals.expected_output: 聚焦模式报告：直接回答超时原因（数据库查询耗时 5554ms），给出证据链和排查建议。
assertions: Uses focused mode since user asks 'why timeout'
Conclusion section directly answers the timeout cause
Identifies the slow query (5554ms) as the root cause
Provides a timeline of the request lifecycle
Suggests grep commands to investigate the slow query further

evals.prompt: 帮我分析下这段日志，没什么特别的问题，就想了解一下整体情况。
evals.expected_output: 根据日志量自动选择快速概览或深度诊断模式，产出对应格式的报告。
assertions: Auto-selects mode based on log volume (quick overview for <100 lines, deep diagnosis for >=100)
Does not use focused mode since user has no specific question
Report includes overview table with log line count, time span, and trace count
If no issues found, states so concisely without padding content
Provides deep-dive grep commands only when suspicious points are found
